hero.headline: Specialty coffee with a farmer's soul
hero.subheadline: Raised among coffee fields in Copán Ruinas (Honduras) and now based in Hamburg, we select the finest specialty micro-lots from around the world.

mission.title: Who we are
mission.text: The Cupping Farmer was born in the coffee fields of Copán Ruinas, Honduras. I grew up among harvests and early-morning cuppings; today from Hamburg I share that passion by selecting origin micro-lots with a farmer's eye.

values.title: Traceable origin
values.text: We know every lot from seed to packaging.

values.title: Sensory quality
values.text: Rigorous cupping at every stage to ensure unique flavor profiles.

values.title: Coffee community
values.text: We work directly with small producers from Honduras, Colombia and other origins.

about.title: Our story
about.subtitle: From Copán Ruinas to the world
about.story_title: The origin of The Cupping Farmer
about.story:
It all started in the coffee fields of Copán Ruinas, Honduras — one of the most authentic coffee-growing regions in Central America. I grew up among farms and harvests, learning that quality is born long before it reaches the cup.

The Cupping Farmer grew from that field experience combined with the rigor of professional cupping. Today, from Hamburg (Germany), I select origin micro-lots from Honduras, Colombia and other coffee-producing countries, with the eye of someone who knows coffee from the root up.

Each bag tells the story of a farm, a process and hands that care for the bean with dedication. That is what I share with you.
